metadata.description: Curated sources for production MLOps, LLMOps, and AgentOps: lifecycle, CI/CD, monitoring, incident response, observability, and governance for ML/LLM/Agent systems.

foundational_standards_and_security.name: EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689)
foundational_standards_and_security.relevance: Regulatory baseline for risk classification, transparency, documentation, and controls.

foundational_standards_and_security.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework 1.0
foundational_standards_and_security.relevance: Baseline risk management framework for AI governance and accountability.

foundational_standards_and_security.name: NIST Generative AI Profile (AI 600-1)
foundational_standards_and_security.relevance: GenAI-specific profile aligned to NIST AI RMF; useful for governance and control mapping.

foundational_standards_and_security.name: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications
foundational_standards_and_security.relevance: Threat categories for LLM-integrated systems (prompt injection, data leakage, abuse).

foundational_standards_and_security.name: NIST Secure Software Development Framework (SSDF)
foundational_standards_and_security.relevance: Secure development practices relevant for ML services, data pipelines, and supply chain.

foundational_standards_and_security.name: NIST Cybersecurity Framework
foundational_standards_and_security.relevance: General security risk management framework that complements ML/LLM governance in production.

foundational_standards_and_security.name: ISO/IEC 42001 (AI management system)
foundational_standards_and_security.relevance: AI management system standard for organizational governance and continuous improvement.

mlops_principles_and_papers.name: Hidden Technical Debt in Machine Learning Systems
mlops_principles_and_papers.relevance: Classic taxonomy of production failure modes and maintenance costs in ML systems.

mlops_principles_and_papers.name: The ML Test Score
mlops_principles_and_papers.relevance: Production readiness rubric for ML systems; useful for deployment gates and audits.

implementation_tools_and_platforms.name: dlt Documentation
implementation_tools_and_platforms.relevance: Data ingestion patterns for loading from APIs/databases into warehouses with incremental updates.

implementation_tools_and_platforms.name: MLflow Documentation
implementation_tools_and_platforms.relevance: Experiment tracking and model registry patterns for promotion and rollback workflows.

implementation_tools_and_platforms.name: DVC Documentation
implementation_tools_and_platforms.relevance: Versioning for datasets and model artifacts to support reproducibility and audits.

implementation_tools_and_platforms.name: Feast Documentation
implementation_tools_and_platforms.relevance: Feature store reference for train/serve parity and offline/online feature reuse.

implementation_tools_and_platforms.name: Kubernetes Documentation
implementation_tools_and_platforms.relevance: Baseline orchestration for model serving, batch jobs, and scalable ML platforms.

implementation_tools_and_platforms.name: Docker Documentation
implementation_tools_and_platforms.relevance: Containerization reference for reproducible builds and deployments of ML services.

implementation_tools_and_platforms.name: Prometheus Documentation
implementation_tools_and_platforms.relevance: Monitoring and alerting reference for latency/errors/saturation and SLO tracking.

implementation_tools_and_platforms.name: OpenTelemetry Documentation
implementation_tools_and_platforms.relevance: Distributed tracing/metrics/logs reference; supports auditability for ML/LLM systems.

implementation_tools_and_platforms.name: OpenTelemetry Semantic Conventions for GenAI
implementation_tools_and_platforms.relevance: Standard telemetry attributes for tokens, models, and tool calls for GenAI endpoints.

agentops_and_llmops.name: AgentOps Documentation
agentops_and_llmops.relevance: AI agent observability platform with session replay, cost tracking, and multi-agent tracing for CrewAI, LangGraph, OpenAI Agents SDK.

agentops_and_llmops.name: Langfuse Documentation
agentops_and_llmops.relevance: Open-source LLM observability platform with tracing, evals, prompt management, and OpenTelemetry integration.

agentops_and_llmops.name: LangSmith Documentation
agentops_and_llmops.relevance: LangChain's observability platform with tracing, datasets, and evaluation workflows for LLM applications.

agentops_and_llmops.name: Arize AI Documentation
agentops_and_llmops.relevance: ML/LLM observability platform with drift detection, explainability, and production monitoring.

agentops_and_llmops.name: WhyLabs AI Observatory
agentops_and_llmops.relevance: ML/LLM monitoring platform with data quality profiling, drift detection, and alerting.

agentops_and_llmops.name: Braintrust Documentation
agentops_and_llmops.relevance: LLMOps platform focused on evaluation, logging, and prompt experimentation.

agentops_and_llmops.name: vLLM Documentation
agentops_and_llmops.relevance: High-throughput LLM serving with PagedAttention, continuous batching, and OpenAI-compatible API.

agentops_and_llmops.name: ZenML Documentation
agentops_and_llmops.relevance: MLOps framework with Model Control Plane providing better lineage tracking than MLflow, supports LLM workflows.

agentops_and_llmops.name: Hopsworks Feature Store
agentops_and_llmops.relevance: Feature store with governance, audit logging, and drift detection for regulated industries (finance, healthcare).

agentops_and_llmops.name: Edge Impulse Documentation
agentops_and_llmops.relevance: TinyML/Edge MLOps platform for embedded ML deployment on microcontrollers and edge devices.
